concepts.title: Čech cocycles and cohomology
concepts.blurb: Cover-based cocycles detect obstruction classes for global patching.

concepts.title: Leray acyclic covers and affine vanishing
concepts.blurb: When every finite intersection is $\mathcal{F}$-acyclic, Čech cohomology on the cover equals the derived-functor cohomology. Affine covers of schemes are Leray for quasi-coherent sheaves by Serre's affine vanishing theorem.

concepts.title: Long exact sequence in cohomology
concepts.blurb: A short exact sequence of sheaves induces a long exact sequence of cohomology groups, with a connecting homomorphism $\delta$ that measures obstructions to lifting sections.

concepts.title: Derived functor sheaf cohomology
concepts.blurb: Right derived functors of global sections define H^i(X,F) abstractly.

concepts.title: Picard groups and Serre duality signals
concepts.blurb: Line bundles, extensions, and duality theorems are naturally cohomological.
